seoTitle: Humble ISD Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks & Important Dates
seoDescription: Humble ISD 2026-2027 calendar with Aug 12 first day, May 28 last day, student/teacher break, Thanksgiving, winter break, spring break, printable PDF, ICS, and Google Calendar download.
pageHeading: Humble ISD Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks & Important Dates
calendarNotes: Humble ISD starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 12, 2026 and ends on May 28, 2027. Student/Teacher Break runs October 12-16, Thanksgiving Holiday runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, and Spring Break runs March 15-19. February 8-9 are listed as inclement weather days that may become school days if time is lost to bad weather. Humble ISD also publishes a Spanish calendar for 2026-2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Humble ISD start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Wednesday, August 12, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Humble ISD Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 15 through Friday, March 19, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Humble ISD in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 28, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Humble ISD have a Spanish calendar for 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Humble ISD publishes Calendario 2026-2027 de Humble ISD, linked as an alternate calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: How many instructional days are in Humble ISD 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The Humble ISD 2026-2027 traditional calendar includes 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Humble ISD have early release days?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Humble ISD lists early release dates during the 2026-2027 school year, including middle school, high school, and all-school early release dates. Families should confirm dismissal times with the district and their assigned campus.

calendarFaqs.q: When do Humble ISD students return after Winter Break?
calendarFaqs.a: Students return for the spring semester on Wednesday, January 6, 2027, after Winter Break and the January staff workdays.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Humble ISD have a traditional calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. This page covers the Humble ISD traditional academic calendar for 2026-2027, which applies to most districtwide school-year planning. Families should confirm campus-specific or program-specific notes with Humble ISD.

calendarFaqs.q: Are Humble ISD calendar dates the same for all schools?
calendarFaqs.a: This page summarizes the districtwide Humble ISD academic calendar. Individual campuses, Summer Creek Early College High School, athletics, testing schedules, graduation events, and emergency updates may have additional dates or schedule notes.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the Humble ISD calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the official Humble ISD calendar PDF link on this page to view, save, or print the 2026-2027 school calendar.

customSections.label: Quick Answer: Humble ISD Calendar 2026-2027
customSections.content: This page covers the Humble ISD Traditional Calendar for most district schools. School starts on Wednesday, August 12, 2026. The last day of school is Friday, May 28, 2027. Spring Break runs March 15-19, 2027. The calendar includes 180 instructional days, printable PDF access, and an importable calendar file for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook. Last reviewed: July 22, 2026.

customSections.label: About Humble ISD 2026-2027 School Calendar
customSections.content:
Humble Independent School District serves students and families in the Humble area of Texas, including northeast Harris County communities such as Humble, Atascocita, and Kingwood. This page summarizes the official Humble ISD 2026-2027 academic calendar for families who need key student dates, school holidays, instructional breaks, early release dates, and downloadable calendar formats.

Families can use this Humble ISD calendar to quickly check the first day of school, holiday breaks, Spring Break dates, the last day of school, printable calendar resources, and calendar import options. Campus-specific events, Summer Creek Early College High School notes, emergency closures, and same-day dismissal changes should still be confirmed directly with Humble ISD or the assigned school.

customSections.label: Humble ISD 2026-2027 Calendar Highlights
customSections.content: These Humble ISD calendar highlights summarize the major dates families are most likely to save when planning school attendance, childcare, transportation, appointments, travel, and summer schedules.

groups.label: Key planning dates
items: Students return for the spring semester on Wednesday, January 6, 2027.
The last day of school is Friday, May 28, 2027.

customSections.label: Humble ISD Calendar Guide for Parents
customSections.content:
Parents can use the Humble ISD 2026-2027 calendar as a planning guide for school attendance, childcare, family travel, appointments, athletics, and daily routines. The most important dates to save are the first day of school, Student/Teacher Break, Thanksgiving Holiday, Winter Break, Spring Break, inclement weather days, early release dates, staff workdays, and the final student day.

Student holidays, staff workdays, and early release dates are especially important because they can affect pickup times, childcare coverage, and transportation. Humble ISD also identifies inclement weather days that may become school days if time is lost to bad weather, so families should treat those dates as conditional planning dates until the district confirms whether make-up time is needed.

groups.label: How families can use this calendar
items: Save first day, last day, and major break dates before planning vacations or summer programs.
Track early release dates separately because dismissal timing may differ by school level.
Review inclement weather days before making February plans because those dates may become school days.
Use the official Humble ISD calendar source for emergency closures, revisions, campus-specific events, and schedule updates.

customSections.content: These Humble ISD dates are useful planning points for families because they affect student attendance, childcare, transportation, travel, and campus routines.

customSections.label: Humble ISD 2026-2027 Calendar Overview
customSections.content:
The Humble ISD 2026-2027 academic calendar is organized around two semesters and four nine-week grading periods. The school year begins with the August 12, 2026 first day of school and continues through the first semester before Winter Break. Students return in January 2027 for the spring semester, which continues through the fourth grading period and the final student day on May 28, 2027.

The calendar includes 180 instructional days, major holiday breaks, Student/Teacher Break, Thanksgiving Holiday, Winter Break, Spring Break, staff workdays, inclement weather days, elementary parent-teacher conference dates, and early release dates. Families should pay special attention to dates that are not simple holiday breaks because early release days, staff workdays, and weather make-up decisions can affect attendance, childcare, transportation, and campus routines.

This overview is intended to help families understand the school-year structure before using the detailed date table, printable PDF, or calendar import file.

customSections.label: Humble ISD Printable PDF vs Calendar File
customSections.content: Humble ISD families can use either the printable school calendar PDF or the calendar file depending on how they prefer to save school dates.

rows: Printing, sharing, and keeping a paper copy at home
Use the official Humble ISD PDF when you want the district's published calendar layout.
Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, and personal scheduling apps
Import the calendar file to save reviewed Humble ISD dates, but verify official updates because it is not a live district sync.
Checking revisions, Spanish calendars, campus notes, and emergency updates
Use Humble ISD as the source of record before making time-sensitive plans.

customSections.label: Humble ISD Calendar 2025-2026 vs 2026-2027
customSections.content: Families comparing the previous Humble ISD calendar with the 2026-2027 school year can use this summary to review major date changes before planning travel, childcare, appointments, and summer activities.

customSections.label: How We Verify Humble ISD Calendar Information
customSections.content:
MySchoolDates reviews the official Humble ISD academic calendar page and published district calendar PDF, compares key dates such as first day, last day, Student/Teacher Break, Thanksgiving Holiday, Winter Break, Spring Break, inclement weather days, early release dates, staff workdays, and elementary parent-teacher conference dates, then converts the reviewed records into the calendar file used on this page.

The official Humble ISD calendar remains the source of record for revisions, campus-specific events, emergency closures, and same-day announcements. For more detail, see the MySchoolDates calendar verification methodology.

customSections.label: Parent Questions About the Humble ISD Calendar
customSections.content: These parent-focused answers cover no-school days, early release, inclement weather days, and schedule-change checks. They are visible page content and do not replace the official Humble ISD calendar.

rows: Does Humble ISD have school on holidays?
Humble ISD schools are closed on district holidays and scheduled break dates listed in the official calendar unless the district announces a calendar change.
Are Humble ISD staff workdays student holidays?
Staff workdays listed as student holidays are no-school days for students, even when district staff report for planning or professional work.
When does Humble ISD summer break start?
Summer break begins after the final student day on Friday, May 28, 2027.
Does Humble ISD have school tomorrow?
This page shows planned calendar dates only. For tomorrow-specific attendance, weather closures, emergency cancellations, or same-day updates, families should check official Humble ISD announcements.
Can inclement weather days become school days?
Yes. Humble ISD notes that February 8-9, 2027 may become school days if time is lost to bad weather.
Is the Humble ISD calendar the same for every campus?

This page summarizes the districtwide academic calendar. Individual campuses, programs, athletics, testing schedules, and graduation events may have additional dates families should confirm with Humble ISD.
